'''Stephen Nash''' (born 14 January 1986) is an English [[rugby league]] footballer who most recently played for the [[Swinton Lions]] in the [[Kingstone Press Championship]]. He play as a {{rlp|pr}} or {{rlp|sr}}.

He has previously played for [[Widnes Vikings|Widnes]], [[Salford Red Devils|Salford]], [[Leigh Centurions|Leigh]], [[Castleford Tigers|Castleford]], and the [[Swinton Lions]].
